Ex Machina

"There is nothing more human than the will to survive."

7.6
2015MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Caleb, a coder at the world's largest internet company, wins a competition to spend a week at a private mountain retreat belonging to Nathan, the reclusive CEO of the company. But when Caleb arrives at the remote location he finds that he will have to participate in a strange and fascinating experiment in which he must interact with the world's first true artificial intelligence, housed in the body of a beautiful robot girl.

Tags

androiddancingfriendshipman vs machinedistrustartificial intelligence (a.i.)isolationtechnologymanipulationhigh technologytreasondeceptionnorwaylaboratoryrobot
